subject: Build product detail and search page templates
description: Phase 3.2+3.3: Build product detail page (src/pages/product/[slug].astro) using getStaticPaths() from data/products.json — product hero with image, quick specs grid, full collapsible specifications, AI review section with pros/cons, price comparison cards with affiliate links, related products carousel, comparison trigger, Product+Review JSON-LD, Giscus comments. Build search/catalog page (src/pages/search.astro) with filter sidebar (brand checkboxes, category, price range), results grid with ProductCards, sort options, URL-driven state, FlexSearch client-side filtering.
activeForm: Building product detail and search pages
